ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport (e.g., NBA, NFL, MLB) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League (e.g., NBA, NFL, MLB) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "daynum" INTEGER /* Day number of the game */,
  "wteam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "wscore" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "lteam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "lscore" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "wloc" TEXT /* Location of the winning team (H/A) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam_id FOREIGN KEY ("lteam_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam_id FOREIGN KEY ("wteam_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the award was given to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award was given to */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the coach in years */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
